DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
theme token-api token-value token
style
pattern

Design System Documentation Standard (DSDS) v0.1

A standard, machine-readable format for design system documentation covering components, design tokens, token groups, themes, styles, and patterns. A DSDS document contains one or more document groups — named collections of typed artifact arrays (components, tokens, tokenGroups, themes, styles, patterns). Individual artifacts are defined in their respective sub-schemas: components/ (component, anatomy, api, design-specifications, variant, state), tokens/ (token, token-group, token-value, token-api, theme), style/ (style), and patterns/ (pattern).

Source: dsds.schema.json

documentGroup

A named collection of design system documentation artifacts. Contains one or more arrays of typed artifacts — components, tokens, token groups, themes, styles, and/or patterns. At least one artifact array must be present.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredHuman-readable name of the collection (e.g., 'Acme Design System', 'Color Tokens', 'Button Documentation').
componentscomponentDoc[]at least oneArray of component documentation objects.
tokenstokenDoc[]at least oneArray of individual token documentation objects.
tokenGroupstokenGroupDoc[]at least oneArray of token group documentation objects. Each group can contain tokens, nested groups, or a mix of both, forming an arbitrarily deep hierarchy.
themesthemeDoc[]at least oneArray of theme documentation objects. Each theme provides alternative token values for a named context such as a color mode, density setting, or brand variant.
stylesstyleDoc[]at least oneArray of style documentation objects.
patternspatternDoc[]at least oneArray of pattern documentation objects.
descriptionrichTextoptional

Constraint: At least one of components, tokens, tokenGroups, themes, styles, patterns must be present.

References: richText, componentDoc, tokenDoc, tokenGroupDoc, themeDoc, styleDoc, patternDoc
